summary: Following a confrontation where the Pioneer guild helps Kang Hyunwoo diffuse a situation with the ISIS guild, Hyunwoo shifts his focus to preparing for the 'King of Masked Combat' show. He meets with representatives from Nike Entertainment and interacts with various high-profile guild masters and professional gamers who are participating in the event. As the rehearsal concludes and the live stream begins with a massive audience, Hyunwoo prepares to host the highly anticipated PvP show.
key_moments: Hyunwoo explores the loot dropped by the defeated player Tian Hu and discovers the Magic Explosion skill book.
Nike Entertainment representatives meet with Hyunwoo to confirm the celebrity participants and commercial sponsors for the new show.
Hyunwoo meets the participating guild masters and pro gamers, including attempts from the Red Bulls and Manchester Devils to scout him.
The live broadcast of 'King of Masked Combat' begins to a massive online audience.
